title: microlicia viscosa
intro: Microlicia viscosa, also known as the sticky tree or viscid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds and infections due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Microlicia viscosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Microlicia viscosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from minor cuts and scrapes to more serious conditions.
